title: Kalpana Chawla Government Medical College, Karnal Recruitment 2026, Apply Now -
how_to_apply: Download the Form: visit the official website. Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). Also, attach a self-addressed envelope of size 25 cm x 10 cm. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed as “Application for the post of ___________________”. Send Application Form: Dispatch Branch, Kalpana Chawla Govt. Medical College, Karnal Kalpana Chawla Government Medical College, Karnal Recruitment 2026

paragraphs: Kalpana Chawla Government Medical College, Karnal Recruitment 2026: Kalpana Chawla Government Medical College, Karnal, has issued a notification for the position of Senior Residents. The recruitment drive comprises 62 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 04-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the Kalpana Chawla Government Medical College, Karnal, Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
kalpana chawla government medical college, karnal recruitment 2026

1. MBBS/BDS from an institution/University recognized by the MCI/DCI (Now NMC). 2. MD/MS/DNB in the subject concerned. a) The result of MD/MS/DNB should have been declared before the closing date. b) Three-year tenure should be completed by the closing date of the application. 3. Must be registered under the State/Central Medical Registration Act.
